name: storefront-error-radar-ecwid
description: Static Ecwid owner dashboard for running storefront diagnostic preview sessions without a backend.

scripts.lint: node --check src/shared/diagnostics-core.js && node --check src/storefront/custom-storefront.js && node --check src/admin/app.js && node --check scripts/build.js && node --check scripts/capture-marketplace-screenshots.js && node --check scripts/smoke-test.js && node --check tests/helpers/browser-harness.js && node --check tests/*.test.js
